name: cloud-safety
description: Block destructive AWS, GCP, and Azure CLI operations — instance termination, bucket deletion, IAM changes
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Block AWS destructive operations
hooks.description: Blocks aws ec2 terminate, s3 rb, s3 rm --recursive, rds delete, iam delete, and cloudformation delete

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^aws (ec2 terminate-instances|s3 rb |s3 rm .* --recursive|rds delete-db|iam delete-|cloudformation delete-stack|lambda delete-function|ecs delete-|eks delete-)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: destructive AWS operation. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block GCP destructive operations
hooks.description: Blocks gcloud compute instances delete, storage rm, sql instances delete, and iam changes

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^gcloud (compute instances delete|storage rm|sql instances delete|container clusters delete|iam service-accounts delete|projects delete|functions delete)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: destructive GCP operation. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block Azure destructive operations
hooks.description: Blocks az vm delete, az group delete, az storage account delete, and az aks delete

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^az (vm delete|group delete|storage account delete|aks delete|sql server delete|webapp delete|functionapp delete)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: destructive Azure operation. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }
